---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill behaves incorrectly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the incorrect behavior.

**Host model & tool**
Which model was running the skill (Claude, GPT, Gemini, …) and which tool
(Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, …).

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Activated with `/prompt-refine`
2. Sent this prompt: …
3. Saw this output: …

**Expected behavior**
What you expected instead.

**Notes**
Anything else useful (verbose diff, screenshots, the commit you are on).
